name: cloudlanguagetools

metadata.name: cloudlanguagetools
metadata.summary: Interface with various cloud APIs for language processing such as translation, text to speech

documentation:
# cloud-language-tools
Interface with various cloud APIs for translation, text to speech

## service keys
see utils/service_keys.py

## building releases
see package.sh

functions.name: cloudlanguagetools.audio_processing.wrap_pcm_data_wave
documentation: take PCM audio and wrap it in a WAV container

classes.name: cloudlanguagetools.ttsvoice.TtsVoice_v3
documentation: this class is used with API version 3

classes.name: cloudlanguagetools.constants.RequestMode
documentation: what triggered this request (batch / on the fly / editor)

variables.name: cloudlanguagetools.chatapi.logger
documentation:
This API is meant to interface with chatbots such as ChatGPT. 
it has a simplified interface meant to integrate well with OpenAI functions, and returns text only
(with the exception of audio)
it will try to find the ideal service and parameters for the given request, 
but sometimes parameters will be overriden to ensure an output is produced.

functions.name: cloudlanguagetools.argostranslate.get_translation_language_enum
documentation: map from the argos translate codes to our internal language codes

classes.name: cloudlanguagetools.languages.CommonLanguage
documentation: maintain a smaller subset of commonly used languages
for chatbot purposes, trimming to the common list of languages saves tokens

methods.name: cloudlanguagetools.servicemanager.ServiceManager.get_translation_language_list_json
documentation: return list of languages supported for translation, using plain objects/strings

methods.name: cloudlanguagetools.servicemanager.ServiceManager.get_transliteration_language_list_json
documentation: return list of languages supported for transliteration, using plain objects/strings

methods.name: cloudlanguagetools.servicemanager.ServiceManager.get_tokenization_options_json
documentation: return list of languages supported for tokenization, using plain objects/strings

methods.name: cloudlanguagetools.servicemanager.ServiceManager.get_pinyin_supported_languages
documentation: special handling for pinyin and jyutping

methods.name: cloudlanguagetools.servicemanager.ServiceManager.service_cost
documentation: return the cost of using a service, in characters

functions.name: cloudlanguagetools.libretranslate.get_translation_language_enum
documentation: map from the argos translate codes to our internal language codes

functions.name: cloudlanguagetools.google.language_code_to_enum
documentation: updates on google text to speech:

methods.name: tests.test_translation.TestTranslation.test_translate_french_libretranslate
documentation: self.translate_text(Service.ArgosTranslate, '中国有很多外国人', Language.zh_cn, Language.en, 'there are many foreigners in china')
self.translate_text(Service.ArgosTranslate, 'Please speak slowly', Language.en, Language.fr, 'Veuillez parler lentement.')
